mapper.sql: pk AS pk, case_id AS caseId, source_id AS sourceId, case_name AS caseName, judgment_date AS judgmentDate, citation_count AS citationCount, summary AS summary, original_document_url AS originalDocumentUrl, insert_time AS insertTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO case_en_US (case_id, source_id, case_name, judgment_date, citation_count, summary, original_document_url) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{sourceId}, #{caseName}, #{judgmentDate}, #{citationCount}, #{summary}, #{originalDocumentUrl})

INSERT INTO case_zh_CN (case_id, source_id, case_name, judgment_date, citation_count, summary, original_document_url) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{sourceId}, #{caseName}, #{judgmentDate}, #{citationCount}, #{summary}, #{originalDocumentUrl})
mapper.select:
SELECT case_id FROM case_en_US WHERE case_id IN
#{caseId}

SELECT FROM
case_en_US case_zh_CN
WHERE case_id IN
#{caseId}
ORDER BY judgment_date DESC
